zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Griggs於大約1539年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可索莫頓時，他的父親Robert Griggs25歲，母親Joane Davey20歲。他於1567年與Alice Boston在英國素福爾可波泰德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1574年10月29日在英國英格蘭素福爾可波泰德享年36歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可波泰德。

nameMeanings.name: Griggs
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southeastern): from the Middle English personal name Grig, a pet form of Gregory (compare Gregg ), with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Gregory
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and French: from a personal name that was popular throughout Christendom in the Middle Ages. The Greek original, Grēgorios, is a derivative of grēgorein ‘to be awake, to be watchful’. However, the Latin form, Gregorius, came to be associated by folk etymology with grex, gregis ‘flock, herd’, under the influence of the Christian image of the good shepherd. The Greek name was borne in the early Christian centuries by two fathers of the Orthodox Church, Saint Gregory Nazianzene (c. 325–390) and Saint Gregory of Nyssa (c. 331–395), and later by sixteen popes, starting with Gregory the Great (c. 540–604). It was also the name of 3rd- and 4th-century apostles of Armenia. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages, e.g. Italian Gregorio , German, Slovak, and Slovenian Gregor , Polish Grzegorz, Czech Řehoř (see Rehor ), and French Gregoire , and also their patronymics and other derivatives, e.g. Polish Grzegorczyk .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Griggs was born about 1539, in Somerton, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Griggs, was 25 and his mother, Joane Davey, was 20. He married Alice Boston in 1567, in Boxted, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 29 October 1574, in Boxted, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 36, and was buried in Boxted, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Griggs est né environ 1539, à Somerton, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Griggs, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Joane Davey, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Alice Boston en 1567, à Boxted, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 29 octobre 1574, à Boxted, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterré à Boxted, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.Hartest with Boxted, Babergh District, S: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 하츠트 위스 보스테드
ko.lifeSummary: Henry Griggs(이)가 대략 1539년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 서머턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Griggs(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Joane Davey(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1567년 영국 수폴크 보스테드에서 Alice Boston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1574년 10월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 보스테드에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 보스테드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Griggs nasceu aproximadamente 1539, em Somerton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert Griggs, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Joane Davey, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Boston em 1567, em Boxted, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 29 de outubro de 1574, em Boxted, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 36 anos, e foi sepultado em Boxted, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Hartest with Boxted, Babergh District, S: хартест вит бокстед, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Griggs родился около 1539 г. в местности сомиртон, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert Griggs было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Joane Davey, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Boston в 1567 г. в местности бокстед, суффолк, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 29 октября 1574 г. в местности бокстед, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 36 лет и был похоронен в местности бокстед, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.
